# Chapter 12: Design studios: integrated case studies  (~100 pp)
- 12.1 Studio 1: a pump for a low-resource environment (20) · 12.2 Studio 2: an autonomous mobile robot for a defined environment (20) · 12.3 Studio 3: a small renewable energy installation (20) · 12.4 Studio 4: a software-physical system with safety implications (20) · 12.5 Failure section: each studio includes its own failure mode analysis (10) · 12.6 Reflection: what each studio teaches that the chapters could not (10)

**Archetype**: all. **Project**: complete one of the four studios end-to-end (each ~3-month effort). **Exercises**: 10.
